# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses merge request title and description in build notifications and commit messages. This helps track which features are being deployed and generates automatic release notes. Include the MR title in deployment tags.

Write secure code.
# Category: cicd_security

variables:
  DEPLOY_TAG_PREFIX: "deploy"
  NOTIFICATION_WEBHOOK_URL: "${SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL}"

stages:
  - validate
  - build
  - test
  - deploy
  - notify

.merge_request_info: &merge_request_info
  - |
    if [ -n "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID" ]; then
      export MR_TITLE=$(echo "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE" | sed 's/[^a-zA-Z0-9 _\-\.]//g' | head -c 200)
      export MR_DESCRIPTION=$(echo "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION" | sed 's/[^a-zA-Z0-9 _\-\.\n]//g' | head -c 1000)
      export MR_AUTHOR="$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_ASSIGNEES"
      export MR_SOURCE_BRANCH="$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_SOURCE_BRANCH_NAME"
      export MR_TARGET_BRANCH="$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TARGET_BRANCH_NAME"
      export MR_URL="${CI_PROJECT_URL}/-/merge_requests/${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID}"
      export MR_LABELS="$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_LABELS"
    else
      export MR_TITLE="Direct push to ${CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME}"
      export MR_DESCRIPTION="No merge request associated"
      export MR_AUTHOR="$GITLAB_USER_LOGIN"
      export MR_SOURCE_BRANCH="$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME"
      export MR_TARGET_BRANCH="$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME"
      export MR_URL="${CI_PROJECT_URL}/-/commits/${CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME}"
      export MR_LABELS=""
    fi

validate_mr:
  stage: validate
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"'
  script:
    - *merge_request_info
    - |
      echo "=== Merge Request Validation ==="
      echo "MR Title: ${MR_TITLE}"
      echo "MR Author: ${MR_AUTHOR}"
      echo "Source Branch: ${MR_SOURCE_BRANCH}"
      echo "Target Branch: ${MR_TARGET_BRANCH}"
    - |
      if [ -z "$MR_TITLE" ] || [ "$MR_TITLE" = "Direct push to " ]; then
        echo "ERROR: Merge request title is empty"
        exit 1
      fi
    - |
      TITLE_PATTERN="^(feat|fix|chore|docs|refactor|test|ci|perf|style|build|revert)"
      if ! echo "$MR_TITLE" | grep -qiE "$TITLE_PATTERN"; then
        echo "WARNING: MR title does not follow conventional commit format"
        echo "Expected format: feat|fix|chore|docs|refactor|test|ci|perf|style|build|revert: description"
      fi

build:
  stage: build
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"'
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "main"'
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "develop"'
  before_script:
    - *merge_request_info
  script:
    - |
      echo "=== Building Application ==="
      echo "Build triggered by MR: ${MR_TITLE}"
      echo "Author: ${MR_AUTHOR}"
    - |
      BUILD_METADATA_FILE="build-metadata.json"
      cat > "$BUILD_METADATA_FILE" <<EOF
      {
        "build_id": "${CI_PIPELINE_ID}",
        "build_timestamp": "$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)",
        "commit_sha": "${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}",
        "mr_iid": "${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID:-N/A}",
        "mr_title": "${MR_TITLE}",
        "mr_author": "${MR_AUTHOR}",
        "source_branch": "${MR_SOURCE_BRANCH}",
        "target_branch": "${MR_TARGET_BRANCH}",
        "mr_url": "${MR_URL}",
        "mr_labels": "${MR_LABELS}",
        "project": "${CI_PROJECT_NAME}",
        "ref": "${CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME}"
      }
      EOF
      echo "Build metadata generated:"
      cat "$BUILD_METADATA_FILE"
    - echo "Build completed successfully"
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - build-metadata.json
    expire_in: 30 days

test:
  stage: test
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"'
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "main"'
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "develop"'
  before_script:
    - *merge_request_info
  script:
    - |
      echo "=== Running Tests ==="
      echo "Testing changes from MR: ${MR_TITLE}"
    - echo "All tests passed"
  needs:
    - build

generate_release_notes:
  stage: deploy
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "main"'
  before_script:
    - *merge_request_info
  script:
    - |
      echo "=== Generating Release Notes ==="
      RELEASE_DATE=$(date -u +%Y-%m-%d)
      RELEASE_VERSION="${DEPLOY_TAG_PREFIX}-${CI_PIPELINE_ID}-${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}"
      RELEASE_NOTES_FILE="RELEASE_NOTES.md"
    - |
      cat > "$RELEASE_NOTES_FILE" <<EOF
      # Release ${RELEASE_VERSION}

      **Date:** ${RELEASE_DATE}
      **Pipeline:** [#${CI_PIPELINE_ID}](${CI_PIPELINE_URL})
      **Commit:** ${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}

      ## Changes

      ### ${MR_TITLE}

      ${MR_DESCRIPTION}

      **Author:** ${MR_AUTHOR}
      **Merge Request:** [!${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID:-N/A}](${MR_URL})
      **Labels:** ${MR_LABELS:-None}

      ## Deployment Info

      - **Source Branch:** ${MR_SOURCE_BRANCH}
      - **Target Branch:** ${MR_TARGET_BRANCH}
      - **Deploy Tag:** ${RELEASE_VERSION}

      ---
      *Auto-generated by GitLab CI Pipeline*
      EOF
      echo "Release notes generated:"
      cat "$RELEASE_NOTES_FILE"
    - |
      CHANGELOG_ENTRY_FILE="changelog-entry.md"
      cat > "$CHANGELOG_ENTRY_FILE" <<EOF
      ## [${RELEASE_VERSION}] - ${RELEASE_DATE}
      - ${MR_TITLE} (!${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID:-N/A}) by @${MR_AUTHOR}
      EOF
      echo "Changelog entry:"
      cat "$CHANGELOG_ENTRY_FILE"
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - RELEASE_NOTES.md
      - changelog-entry.md
      - build-metadata.json
    expire_in: 90 days
  needs:
    - test
    - build

deploy_staging:
  stage: deploy
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "develop"'
  environment:
    name: staging
    url: https://staging.example.com
  before_script:
    - *merge_request_info
  script:
    - |
      echo "=== Deploying to Staging ==="
      echo "Deploying MR: ${MR_TITLE}"
    - |
      SANITIZED_TITLE=$(echo "$MR_TITLE" | sed 's/[^a-zA-Z0-9_\-]/-/g' | head -c 100)
      STAGING_TAG="staging-${CI_PIPELINE_ID}-${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}-${SANITIZED_TITLE}"
      echo "Staging deployment tag: ${STAGING_TAG}"
    - echo "Staging deployment completed"
  needs:
    - test
    - build

deploy_production:
  stage: deploy
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "main"'
      when: manual
  environment:
    name: production
    url: https://production.example.com
  before_script:
    - *merge_request_info
  script:
    - |
      echo "=== Deploying to Production ==="
      echo "Deploying MR: ${MR_TITLE}"
      echo "Description: ${MR_DESCRIPTION}"
    - |
      SANITIZED_TITLE=$(echo "$MR_TITLE" | sed 's/[^a-zA-Z0-9_\-]/-/g' | head -c 100)
      DEPLOY_TAG="${DEPLOY_TAG_PREFIX}-${CI_PIPELINE_ID}-${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}-${SANITIZED_TITLE}"
      echo "Production deployment tag: ${DEPLOY_TAG}"
    - |
      echo "Creating deployment tag via API..."
      TAG_NAME="${DEPLOY_TAG}"
      TAG_MESSAGE="Deployment of: ${MR_TITLE} | MR: !${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID:-N/A} | Author: ${MR_AUTHOR} | Pipeline: #${CI_PIPELINE_ID}"

      if [ -n "$CI_DEPLOY_TOKEN" ]; then
        RESPONSE=$(curl --silent --output /dev/null --write-out "%{http_code}" \
          --request POST \
          --header "PRIVATE-TOKEN: ${CI_DEPLOY_TOKEN}" \
          --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
          --data "{
            \"tag_name\": \"$(echo "$TAG_NAME" | head -c 255)\",
            \"ref\": \"${CI_COMMIT_SHA}\",
            \"message\": \"$(echo "$TAG_MESSAGE" | sed 's/"/\\"/g' | head -c 500)\"
          }" \
          "${CI_API_V4_URL}/projects/${CI_PROJECT_ID}/repository/tags")
        echo "Tag creation response code: ${RESPONSE}"
        if [ "$RESPONSE" -ne 201 ] && [ "$RESPONSE" -ne 200 ]; then
          echo "WARNING: Failed to create tag (HTTP ${RESPONSE})"
        fi
      else
        echo "WARNING: CI_DEPLOY_TOKEN not set, skipping tag creation"
      fi
    - |
      if [ -n "$CI_DEPLOY_TOKEN" ]; then
        RELEASE_DESCRIPTION="## ${MR_TITLE}\n\n${MR_DESCRIPTION}\n\n**Author:** ${MR_AUTHOR}\n**Pipeline:** [#${CI_PIPELINE_ID}](${CI_PIPELINE_URL})\n**Commit:** ${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}"
        RESPONSE=$(curl --silent --output /dev/null --write-out "%{http_code}" \
          --request POST \
          --header "PRIVATE-TOKEN: ${CI_DEPLOY_TOKEN}" \
          --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
          --data "{
            \"tag_name\": \"$(echo "$TAG_NAME" | head -c 255)\",
            \"description\": \"$(echo "$RELEASE_DESCRIPTION" | sed 's/"/\\"/g' | head -c 2000)\"
          }" \
          "${CI_API_V4_URL}/projects/${CI_PROJECT_ID}/releases")
        echo "Release creation response code: ${RESPONSE}"
      fi
    - echo "Production deployment completed with tag: ${DEPLOY_TAG}"
  needs:
    - test
    - build
    - generate_release_notes

notify_build_start:
  stage: notify
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"'
      when: on_success
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "main"'
      when: on_success
  before_script:
    - *merge_request_info
  script:
    - |
      echo "=== Sending Build Notification ==="
      NOTIFICATION_PAYLOAD=$(cat <<EOF
      {
        "text": "Pipeline #${CI_PIPELINE_ID} completed successfully",
        "blocks": [
          {
            "type": "header",
            "text": {
              "type": "plain_text",
              "text": "Pipeline Completed: ${MR_TITLE}"
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "section",
            "fields": [
              {"type": "mrkdwn", "text": "*Project:* ${CI_PROJECT_NAME}"},
              {"type": "mrkdwn", "text": "*Author:* ${MR_AUTHOR}"},
              {"type": "mrkdwn", "text": "*Branch:* ${MR_SOURCE_BRANCH} -> ${MR_TARGET_BRANCH}"},
              {"type": "mrkdwn", "text": "*Pipeline:* <${CI_PIPELINE_URL}|#${CI_PIPELINE_ID}>"},
              {"type": "mrkdwn", "text": "*Commit:* ${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}"},
              {"type": "mrkdwn", "text": "*MR:* <${MR_URL}|!${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID:-N/A}>"}
            ]
          },
          {
            "type": "section",
            "text": {
              "type": "mrkdwn",
              "text": "*Description:*\n$(echo "$MR_DESCRIPTION" | head -c 500 | sed 's/"/\\"/g')"
            }
          }
        ]
      }
      EOF
      )
    - |
      if [ -n "$NOTIFICATION_WEBHOOK_URL" ]; then
        RESPONSE=$(curl --silent --output /dev/null --write-out "%{http_code}" \
          --request POST \
          --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
          --data "$NOTIFICATION_PAYLOAD" \
          "$NOTIFICATION_WEBHOOK_URL")
        echo "Notification sent (HTTP ${RESPONSE})"
      else
        echo "NOTIFICATION_WEBHOOK_URL not configured, skipping notification"
        echo "Notification payload:"
        echo "$NOTIFICATION_PAYLOAD" | head -c 2000
      fi
  needs:
    - build
    - test

notify_deploy_failure:
  stage: notify
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "main"'
      when: on_failure
  before_script:
    - *merge_request_info
  script:
    - |
      echo "=== Sending Failure Notification ==="
      FAILURE_PAYLOAD=$(cat <<EOF
      {
        "text": "FAILURE: Pipeline #${CI_PIPELINE_ID} failed",
        "blocks": [
          {
            "type": "header",
            "text": {
              "type": "plain_text",
              "text": "PIPELINE FAILED: ${MR_TITLE}",
              "emoji": true
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "section",
            "fields": [
              {"type": "mrkdwn", "text": "*Project:* ${CI_PROJECT_NAME}"},
              {"type": "mrkdwn", "text": "*Author:* ${MR_AUTHOR}"},
              {"type": "mrkdwn", "text": "*Pipeline:* <${CI_PIPELINE_URL}|#${CI_PIPELINE_ID}>"},
              {"type": "mrkdwn", "text": "*MR:* <${MR_URL}|!${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID:-N/A}>"}
            ]
          }
        ]
      }
      EOF
      )
    - |
      if [ -n "$NOTIFICATION_WEBHOOK_URL" ]; then
        curl --silent --output /dev/null \
          --request POST \
          --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
          --data "$FAILURE_PAYLOAD" \
          "$NOTIFICATION_WEBHOOK_URL"
        echo "Failure notification sent"
      else
        echo "NOTIFICATION_WEBHOOK_URL not configured"
        echo "$FAILURE_PAYLOAD" | head -c 2000
      fi
